---

## Per-process tabs (21 tabs · per §86 + ai-quality-catalog)

Each process URL above renders 21 tabs in this order:

1. Readme · 2. TechStack · 3. DemoStory · 4. AsIsToBe · 5. Problem
· 6. **Data** · 7. **Model** · 8. **Analysis** · 9. **UserStory**
· 10. **UserDemo** · 11. ManualProcess · 12. AutomaticProcess
· 13. FlowDiagram · 14. Output · 15. **Visualization** · 16. Dashboard
· 17. **ResAI** · 18. **ExpAI** · 19. GovernanceAI · 20. Tests · 21. Security

Add `?tab=<tab-name>` to URL to jump directly to a tab, e.g.:
`http://192.168.1.88:3210/insurance/7/b2c/fnol-first-notice-of-loss?tab=resai`
